summary: Completed comprehensive testing of all requested features. All cart functionality, coaching page content, training programs header, and COD checkout flow working correctly.
passed_tests: Cart persistence: Items persist in localStorage after page refresh
Cart NOT auto-opening: Cart sidebar is NOT visible on /shop page load
Cart open/close: Cart opens on icon click, closes properly, stays closed on navigation
Shop page products display: All 4 products displayed correctly (Wooden Parallettes, Resistance Band Set, Cork Yoga Blocks, Wooden Gym Rings)
Add to cart flow: Product added successfully with toast notification and cart count badge
Cart quantity update: Plus/minus buttons work correctly
Coaching page hero: 'Step-by-Step Progressions' title displayed
Coaching page 'How It Works': 3 steps (Fill Training Form, Connect Over a Call, Train Using App)
Coaching page pricing: 2 Months (₹24,000) and 6 Months (₹60,000) options displayed
Coaching page CTA: 'Apply for Coaching' and 'Schedule on Calendly' buttons present
Training Programs header: Updated background image (IMG_8920.JPG) correctly displayed
COD checkout flow: Full 3-step checkout (Cart → Address → Payment) works
COD order placement: Order placed successfully via /api/contact endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: All cart persistence and checkout fixes verified working. Razorpay UPI/Card payment will fail due to invalid test keys (expected). COD payments work via /api/contact endpoint.
notes: Razorpay payment integration has INVALID test keys - UPI/Card payment failure is EXPECTED as documented. COD payment works correctly through /api/contact endpoint.
